original: “I’ll just be in here if you need me!”
“Guess who’s baaack... It’s me, [gooarmor.name]!” Your gooey partner springs out and gives you a great big hug, excited about her return.

“O-oh... okay. I hope I was worth the price.” [gooarmor.name] looks at you with a wimper in her lips and watery eyes. When she notices your reaction, she tries to perk up before quickly disappearing with a final farewell, “Goodbye now!”

“No way! You wanna trade me for... for that?!” [gooarmor.name] exclaims. “That’s like... like... argh!” The goo is so flustered that she can barely come up with any more words. Giving up due to the futility of the situation, she just melts into a silver puddle and speeds off and away from you, never to be seen again.

“Well, if you don’t have any place for me, I’ll just pack my things and go...” [gooarmor.name] materializes a faux suitcase and fills it with various self-created items, closes it, and cartoonishly stuffs the case between her cleavage. “Have a nice day!” she finishes as she leaps into the nearest trash chute and ejects herself out of your ship.

“Out here? With all these people?” [gooarmor.name] appears very overwhelmed. “Maybe I should make some new friends? Do any of them like blowjobs? I wonder...” She continues thinking out loud to herself and disappears into the distance.

“Out here? All alone? By myself?” [gooarmor.name] appears very scared at the thought. “I-If you say so... I mean, I can make new friends... maybe?” Saddened at losing a friend, she wanders off and disappears into the distance.

“You... you want me to leave?” [gooarmor.name] appears very concerned. “I mean, like, if you want your private space and stuff, I get it. Hm... maybe I can find a new friend?” With a final pout, she reforms herself into a blob and quietly slinks away from view.

“[pc.MisterMiss] Steele...” [gooarmor.name]’s faint voice hits your ear. “I don’t feel so good...” You sense the silvery mass flow around you as she morphs into a very familiar shape. Her hugging form weighs you down as her face comes into view. Instead of the bright visage you are used to seeing, a look of desperation takes its place. Small, gray bloblets detach from her body, dispersing into the open air and, bit by bit, the once happy goo girl is rapidly dissolving away in your arms. “I-I don’t wanna go... Please, I--...” And then silence. Nothing is left of your gray goo friend.
